lines: One block at a time, {player}! What shall we build?
Building is like a puzzle for your hands.
quest_offer_line: This machine is missing some parts. Could you help me put it back together, {player}?
quest_progress_line: Click, clack! It's starting to look great! Keep going, {player}!
quest_complete_line: It's perfect! You're a natural-born builder, {player}. Look at it go!
